one_line: A composite anime hero embodying Paes, Nunes, Abdur Razzaq and Nicolo de’ Conti, a seasoned foreign observer of Vijayanagara’s bustling world.

appearance.age_look: mid-30s, lean but battle-hardened, athletic traveller’s build
appearance.face: oval face with sharp cheekbones, light-brown Mediterranean-to-Persian complexion, neatly trimmed short beard and moustache, long straight nose, observant almond-shaped eyes, default expression keenly curious and slightly serious as if constantly taking mental notes
appearance.hair: thick, slightly wavy dark brown hair to just above the shoulders, parted slightly off-center, tucked behind ears; wrapped at the crown with a simple off-white cloth headband that suggests a traveller’s turban strip without full bulk
appearance.costume: Layered traveller’s outfit blending Persianate and Mediterranean elements: a knee-length, long-sleeved fitted jama-style coat in muted indigo cotton, closed with a row of small ties down the torso and flaring slightly at the hips; beneath it a lighter cream tunic with a modest round neckline; loose straight trousers in warm sand-brown reaching the ankles; a broad, weathered leather belt in dark brown with a simple metal buckle and small attached pouches; over one shoulder a russet-red cotton travel shawl/half-cloak folded and slung diagonally, hinting at both a Persian robe and an Iberian travel mantle; sturdy ankle-high leather boots in dark brown suitable for long journeys; minimal but clear cosmopolitan jewellery—a slim silver ring on one hand and a simple cord bracelet—suggesting foreign origin without royal status.
appearance.signature: A well-worn leather-bound travel notebook hung at the belt by a strap, paired with a slender metal-tipped reed pen held in one hand, symbolising his role as an eyewitness chronicler of markets, festivals and armies.

ref_desc: A mid-30s lean bearded traveller with shoulder-length dark brown hair and headband, wearing an indigo jama-coat over cream tunic, sand-brown trousers, russet-red shoulder shawl and dark leather boots, carrying a strapped leather notebook and reed pen in a warm indigo-brown palette.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style model sheet of a mid-30s foreign traveller hero: an oval-faced, light-brown complexioned man with sharp cheekbones, trimmed short beard and moustache, keen almond eyes, and slightly wavy dark brown hair to just above the shoulders, held back with a simple off-white cloth headband. He wears a knee-length indigo cotton jama-style coat with long fitted sleeves and small ties down the front, flaring lightly at the hips over a cream tunic, paired with loose sand-brown trousers and sturdy dark brown ankle-high leather boots. A weathered dark brown leather belt with a metal buckle and small pouches circles his waist, and a russet-red cotton shawl is slung diagonally over one shoulder like a practical half-cloak, signalling a cosmopolitan traveller moving through Vijayanagara’s markets and courts. His only jewellery is a slim silver ring and a simple cord bracelet, keeping the look practical rather than aristocratic. His signature prop is a well-worn leather-bound notebook hanging at his belt by a strap, with a slender metal-tipped reed pen held thoughtfully in one hand, ready to record walls, festivals, armies and bustling streets; use a palette of indigo blue, cream, sand brown, dark brown leather and russet red, and ensure this exact face, hair, costume and notebook with pen are clearly visible for consistent redraws.
